name: cws-map
description: 2026 NCAA Baseball Tournament interactive map — a Next.js + React broadcast-styled app (live ESPN scores/odds, schedule, brackets, pick'em). Static data files are synced to /public/legacy/ for runtime load; optional Auth.js sign-in adds cross-device pick sync.

scripts.test: node scripts/test-bracket.mjs && node scripts/test-league.mjs && node scripts/test-lib.mjs
